---
title: "Equine Influenza Efficacy 2026"
author: "Olivia Rippee"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
#library(devtools)
#devtools::install_github("ABS-dev/MF")
library(MF)
library(epitools)
library(flextable)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggbreak)
```


```{r data}

data_2026 <- read.csv("efficacy_data.csv")
colnames(data_2026) <- gsub("\\.", "_", colnames(data_2026)) 

data_2026 <- data_2026 %>% 
  rename_with(~ gsub("_", "", .), .cols = Halter_) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Halter)) %>%
  filter(Halter != 69) %>%
  arrange(Halter, Day) %>%
  group_by(Halter) %>%
  mutate(
    DOC = max(Day[Study_Day == "DOC"], na.rm = TRUE),
    
    VI_PCR = case_when(
      VI_PCR == "Pos" ~ "Pos", VI_PCR == "Neg" ~ "Neg", VI_PCR == "Suspect" ~ "Neg", TRUE~NA),
    
    # Treatment Groups
    # -----------------
    Group = case_when(Group == 1 ~ "IVP", Group == 2 ~ "Control"),
 
    # Discharge
    # ---------
    Discharge_Status = case_when(
      Nasal_Discharge >= 2 | Ocular_Discharge >= 2 ~ "Yes",
      TRUE~"No"),
    Discharge_After_DOC = case_when(
      Discharge_Status == "Yes" & Day >= DOC ~ "Yes",
      TRUE~"No"),
    Discharge_Presence_Overall = if_else(any(Discharge_After_DOC == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
    
    # Discharge Duration
    # ------------------
    Discharge_Start_Day = {   # first discharge day after DOC (or NA if none)
      pos_days <- Day[Discharge_After_DOC == "Yes" & Day >= DOC]
      if(length(pos_days) > 0) min(pos_days) else NA_real_},
    
    Discharge_End_Day = {     # last discharge day after DOC (or NA if none)
      pos_days <- Day[Discharge_After_DOC == "Yes" & Day >= DOC]
      if(length(pos_days) > 0) max(pos_days) else NA_real_},
    
    Discharge_Duration = ifelse(
      !is.na(Discharge_Start_Day) & !is.na(Discharge_End_Day),
      Discharge_End_Day - Discharge_Start_Day + 1, 0),
    
    # Shedding Duration (PCR)
    # -----------------------
    Shedding_Start_Day = {   # first positive day after DOC (or NA if none)
      pos_days <- Day[VI_PCR == "Pos" & Day >= DOC]
      if(length(pos_days) > 0) min(pos_days) else NA_real_},
    Shedding_End_Day = {  # last positive day after DOC (or NA if none)
      pos_days <- Day[VI_PCR == "Pos" & Day >= DOC]
      if(length(pos_days) > 0) max(pos_days) else NA_real_},
    Shedding_Duration = ifelse(!is.na(Shedding_Start_Day) & !is.na(Shedding_End_Day),
                      Shedding_End_Day - Shedding_Start_Day + 1,  0),
    
    # Pyrexia Status
    # --------------
    Pyrexia_Status = case_when(
      Temperature >= 102.5 ~ "Yes", TRUE~"No"),
    Pyrexia_After_DOC = case_when(
      Pyrexia_Status == "Yes" & Day >= DOC ~ "Yes", TRUE~"No"),
    Pyrexia_Presence_Overall = if_else(any(Pyrexia_After_DOC == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),

    # Pyrexia Duration
    # ----------------
    Pyrexia_Start_Day = {   # first positive day after DOC (or NA if none)
      pos_days <- Day[Pyrexia_After_DOC == "Yes" & Day >= DOC]
      if(length(pos_days) > 0) min(pos_days) else NA_real_},
    Pyrexia_End_Day = {  # last positive day after DOC (or NA if none)
      pos_days <- Day[Pyrexia_After_DOC == "Yes" & Day >= DOC]
      if(length(pos_days) > 0) max(pos_days) else NA_real_},
    Pyrexia_Duration = ifelse(!is.na(Pyrexia_Start_Day) & !is.na(Pyrexia_End_Day),
                      Pyrexia_End_Day - Pyrexia_Start_Day + 1,  0),
    
    # Titer Data
    # -----------
    HAI_Kentucky = case_when(
      HAI_Kentucky == "<2"   ~ 1,
      HAI_Kentucky == ">256" ~ 384,
      is.na(HAI_Kentucky) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ parse_number(HAI_Kentucky)),
    
    HAI_Richmond = case_when(
      HAI_Richmond == "<2"   ~ 1,
      HAI_Richmond == ">256" ~ 384,
      is.na(HAI_Richmond) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ parse_number(HAI_Richmond))) %>%
  
  ungroup()

# Establish Control group as reference
data_2026$Group <- factor(data_2026$Group, levels = c("Control", "IVP"))

data_individual <- data_2026 %>% 
  group_by(Halter) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%    # keeps the last row per Halter
  ungroup()

# Establish Control group as reference
data_individual$Group <- factor(data_individual$Group, levels = c("Control", "IVP"))

# Verify duration is calculated correctly
# test <- data[, c("Halter", "Day", "VI_PCR", "Shedding_Duration", "Pyrexia_Duration")]

```

```{r functions}

# P-value formatting
# -------------------
format_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return(NA_character_)
  if (p < 0.0001) {
    output <- "< 0.0001"
  } else {output <- sprintf("%.4f", p)}}


# 5-number summary formatting
# ----------------------------
format_integer <- function(x) {
  ifelse(x %% 1 == 0,
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 0),
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 2))}


# Prevented fraction
# -------------------
prevented_fraction <- function(data_individual, group_col, outcome_col) {
  group_col   <- enquo(group_col)
  outcome_col <- enquo(outcome_col)

  # Calculate counts and proportions
  summary_counts <- data_individual %>%
    group_by(!!group_col) %>%
    summarize(
      Positive = sum(!!outcome_col == "Yes"),
      Total = n(),
      Prop = Positive / Total,
      .groups = "drop")

  # Create 2x2 contingency table
  ct <- table(pull(data_individual, !!group_col),
              pull(data_individual, !!outcome_col))

  # Relative risk with bootstrap CI
  RR_result <- riskratio(ct, method = "boot", )

  RR_estimate <- RR_result$measure[, "estimate"]
  RR_lower    <- RR_result$measure[, "lower"]
  RR_upper    <- RR_result$measure[, "upper"]
  fisher_p    <- RR_result$p.value[, "fisher.exact"]

  # Extract IVP prevented fraction (assuming IVP is 2nd row)
  PF_ivp        <- 1 - RR_estimate[2]
  Lower_CI_ivp  <- 1 - RR_upper[2]

  # Create final summary table
  summary_table <- summary_counts %>%
    mutate(Group = factor(!!group_col, levels = c("IVP", "Control"))) %>%
    arrange(Group) %>%
    mutate(
      `Treatment Group` = ifelse(Group == "IVP", "1 = IVP", "2 = Control"),
      `Proportion of Positive Cases` =
        paste0(Positive, " / ", Total, " = ", sprintf("%.2f", Prop)),
      `Prevented Fraction` =
        ifelse(Group == "IVP", sprintf("%.2f", PF_ivp), ""),
      `Lower 95% Confidence Bound` =
        ifelse(Group == "IVP", sprintf("%.2f", Lower_CI_ivp), ""),
      `Fisher Exact p-value` = ifelse(Group == "IVP", format_p(fisher_p[2]), "")) %>%
    select(
      `Treatment Group`,
      `Proportion of Positive Cases`,
      `Prevented Fraction`,
      `Lower 95% Confidence Bound`,
      `Fisher Exact p-value`)

  return(summary_table)}


# Five number summary
# -------------------
five_num_summary <- function(data_individual, group_col, duration_col,
                             caption = "Outcome Five-Number Summary") {

  group_col    <- enquo(group_col)
  duration_col <- enquo(duration_col)

  summary_table_5num <- data_individual %>%
    mutate(Group = factor(!!group_col, levels = c("IVP", "Control"))) %>%
    group_by(Group) %>%
    summarize(
      n = n(),
      Minimum = min(!!duration_col, na.rm = TRUE),
      `25th Percentile` = quantile(!!duration_col, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      Median = median(!!duration_col, na.rm = TRUE),
      `75th Percentile` = quantile(!!duration_col, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      Maximum = max(!!duration_col, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop") %>%
    rename(
      `25th\nPercentile` = `25th Percentile`,
      `75th\nPercentile` = `75th Percentile`) %>%
    mutate(`Treatment Group` = ifelse(Group == "IVP", "1 = IVP", "2 = Control")) %>%
    select(`Treatment Group`, n:Maximum) %>%
    mutate(across(2:7, ~ format_integer(.x)))}


# Mitigated fraction
# -------------------
mitigated_fraction <- function(data_individual, group_col, duration_col,
                               compare = c("Control", "IVP"), seed = 1234) {
  group_col    <- enquo(group_col)
  duration_col <- enquo(duration_col)

  # Create formula dynamically
  formula_obj <- as.formula(
    paste0(quo_name(duration_col), " ~ ", quo_name(group_col)))

  # Calculate mitigated fraction
  mf_boot <- MFBoot(formula_obj, data_individual, compare = compare, seed = seed)

  # Calculate Wilcoxon Rank Sum p-value
  test <- wilcox.test(formula_obj, data_individual)
  p_value <- test$p.value

  # MF, 95% lower bound, and p-value
  summary_table_mf <- tibble(
    `Mitigated Fraction` = round(mf_boot$stat[1,1], 2),
    `Lower 95% Confidence Bound` = round(mf_boot$stat[1,3], 2),
    `Wilcoxon Rank Sum p-value` = format_p(p_value))

  return(summary_table_mf)}


# Create flextable output
# ------------------------
create_flextable <- function(summary_table, caption = "Outcome Presence",
                             font_size = 11) {
  flextable(summary_table) %>%
    set_caption(caption) %>%
    autofit() %>%
    align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
    fit_to_width(max_width = 7) %>% 
    fontsize(size = font_size, part = "all")}


# Boxplot for duration
# ---------------------
create_duration_boxplot <- function(data_individual, group_col, duration_col,
                                    title = "Outcome Duration") {
  group_col    <- enquo(group_col)
  duration_col <- enquo(duration_col)

  ggplot(data_individual, aes(y = !!group_col, x = !!duration_col, fill = !!group_col)) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.6) +
    geom_dotplot(binaxis = "x", stackdir = "center", dotsize = 0.4, binwidth = 0.4, color = "black", fill = "black") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = title,
      #subtitle = paste0(
      #  "Mitigated Fraction = ", round(mf_boot$stat[1,1], 2),
      #  ", Lower 95% CI = ", round(mf_boot$stat[1,3], 2),
      #  ", p = ", format_p(p_value, 6)),
      x = "Duration (Days)", y = "Treatment Group") +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10))}


# Titer incidence
# ----------------
titer_incidence <- function(data_2026, group_col, titer_col, day_col,
                            threshold = 2, days_keep = c(0, 21, 35, 42, 49)) {
  group_col <- enquo(group_col)
  titer_col <- enquo(titer_col)
  day_col   <- enquo(day_col)

  data_titer_incidence <- data_2026 %>%
    filter(!is.na(!!titer_col)) %>%
    mutate(
      Pos = ifelse(!!titer_col > threshold, 1, 0),
      Group = factor(!!group_col, levels = c("IVP", "Control")),
      Day = factor(!!day_col))

  data_titer_incidence_5day <- data_titer_incidence %>%
    filter(Day %in% days_keep) %>%
    mutate(
      Day = recode(as.character(Day), "35" = "35 (DOC)"),
      Day = factor(Day, levels = c("0", "21", "35 (DOC)", "42", "49")))

  titer_incidence_table <- data_titer_incidence_5day %>%
    group_by(Group, Day) %>%
    summarize(
      Positive_n = sum(Pos, na.rm = TRUE),
      Total = n(),
      Prop_Positive = Positive_n / Total,
      .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(Display = paste0(
      Positive_n, " / ", Total, " = ",
      sprintf("%.2f", Prop_Positive)))

  titer_incidence_wide <- titer_incidence_table %>%
    select(Group, Day, Display) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Day, values_from = Display) %>%
    arrange(Group) %>%
    mutate(`Treatment Group` = ifelse(Group == "IVP", "1 = IVP", "2 = Control")) %>%
    select(`Treatment Group`, `0`, `21`, `35 (DOC)`, `42`, `49`)

  fisher_pvalues <- data_titer_incidence_5day %>%
    group_by(Day) %>%
    summarize(
      p_value = {
        tab <- table(Group, Pos)
        if (all(dim(tab) == c(2, 2))) {
          fisher.test(tab)$p.value
        } else {NA_real_}}, .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(p_value = sapply(p_value, format_p)) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Day,
                values_from = p_value)

  fisher_pvalues <- fisher_pvalues %>%
    mutate(`Treatment Group` = "Fisher Exact p-value") %>%
    select(`Treatment Group`, `0`, `21`, `35 (DOC)`, `42`, `49`)

  final_table <- bind_rows(titer_incidence_wide, fisher_pvalues)

  return(final_table)}


# Boxplot for titer 
# ------------------
create_titer_boxplot <- function(data, group_col, titer_col, day_col,
                                 title = "Virus Titers",
                                 y_label = "HAI Titer",
                                 x_label = "Treatment Group",
                                 days_keep = c(0, 21, 35, 42, 49),
                                 y_break = c(100, 350)) {

  group_col <- enquo(group_col)
  titer_col <- enquo(titer_col)
  day_col   <- enquo(day_col)

  # Prepare 5-day subset
  plot_data <- data %>%
    filter(!is.na(!!titer_col)) %>%
    filter(!!day_col %in% days_keep) %>%
    mutate(
      Day = recode(as.character(!!day_col), "35" = "35 (DOC)"),
      Day = factor(Day, levels = c("0", "21", "35 (DOC)", "42", "49")),
      Group = factor(!!group_col, levels = c("IVP", "Control")))

  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Group, y = !!titer_col, fill = fct_rev(Group))) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    facet_wrap(~ Day, nrow = 1) +
    scale_y_break(y_break) +
    labs(title = title,
         y = y_label,
         x = x_label) +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10))}

```

# Presence of Disease (Nasal or Ocular Discharge)

<br>

```{r presence discharge}

discharge_pf_table <- prevented_fraction(data_individual, group_col=Group, outcome_col=Discharge_Presence_Overall)

create_flextable(discharge_pf_table, caption = "Clinical Disease Presence")

```

\pagebreak

# Duration of Disease (Nasal or Ocular Discharge)

<br>

```{r duration discharge}

discharge_table_5num <- five_num_summary(data_individual, Group, Discharge_Duration)

create_flextable(discharge_table_5num, caption = "Clinical Disease Duration Five-Number Summary")

```

<br>


```{r duration discharge mf}

discharge_mf_table <- mitigated_fraction(data_individual, Group, Discharge_Duration)

create_flextable(discharge_mf_table, caption = "Clinical Disease Duration Results")

```

<br>

```{r duration discharge boxplot}

create_duration_boxplot(data_individual, Group, Discharge_Duration, title = "Clinical Disease Duration")

```

\pagebreak

# Duration of Shedding (VI PCR)

<br>

```{r duration shedding}

shedding_table_5num <- five_num_summary(data_individual, Group, Discharge_Duration)

create_flextable(shedding_table_5num, caption = "Viral Shedding Duration Five-Number Summary")

```

<br>

```{r duration shedding mf}

shedding_mf_table <- mitigated_fraction(data_individual, Group, Shedding_Duration)

create_flextable(shedding_mf_table, caption = "Viral Shedding Duration Results")

```

<br>

```{r duration shedding boxplot}

create_duration_boxplot(data_individual, Group, Shedding_Duration, title = "Viral Shedding Duration")

```

\pagebreak

# Incidence of Pyrexia (Rectal Temperatures)

<br>

```{r pyrexia presence}

pyrexia_pf_table <- prevented_fraction(data_individual, Group, Pyrexia_Presence_Overall)

create_flextable(pyrexia_pf_table, caption = "Pyrexia Presence")

```

\pagebreak

# Duration of Pyrexia (Rectal Temperatures)

<br>

```{r pyrexia duration}

pyrexia_table_5num <- five_num_summary(data_individual, Group, Pyrexia_Duration)

create_flextable(pyrexia_table_5num, caption = "Pyrexia Duration Five-Number Summary")

```

<br>

```{r pyrexia duration mf}

pyrexia_mf_table <- mitigated_fraction(data_individual, Group, Pyrexia_Duration)

create_flextable(pyrexia_mf_table, caption = "Pyrexia Duration Results")

```

<br>

```{r pyrexia duration boxplot}

create_duration_boxplot(data_individual, Group, Pyrexia_Duration, title = "Pyrexia Shedding Duration")

```

\pagebreak

# Incidence of Kentucky Virus (HAI Titers)

<br>

```{r HAI titer Kentucky}

KY_titer_incidence <- titer_incidence(data_2026, Group, HAI_Kentucky, Day)

create_flextable(KY_titer_incidence, caption = "Kentucky Virus HAI Titer Incidence", font_size = 10)

```

<br>

```{r HAI titer Kentucky boxplot, fig.width=7}

create_titer_boxplot(data_2026, Group, HAI_Kentucky, Day)

```

\pagebreak

# Incidence of Richmond Virus (HAI Titers)

<br>

```{r HAI titer Richmond}

RM_titer_incidence <- titer_incidence(data_2026, Group, HAI_Richmond, Day)

create_flextable(RM_titer_incidence, caption = "Richmond Virus HAI Titer Incidence", font_size = 10)

```

<br>

```{r HAI titer Richmond boxplot, fig.width=7}

create_titer_boxplot(data_2026, Group, HAI_Richmond, Day)

```
